name: xxkeefer-skills
description: Personal workflow skills -- framework-agnostic, language-agnostic, tool-agnostic. Primitives is always required.

plugins.name: primitives
plugins.description: Foundational skills that other domains compose. Always install this domain.

plugins.name: developer
plugins.description: Opinionated engineering workflows -- investigation, planning, implementation, closure.

plugins.name: journal
plugins.description: Personal planner -- cascading goal/reflection system for Obsidian.

plugins.name: meta
plugins.description: Skills about skills -- writing, auditing, and managing the lifecycle of skills.

plugins.name: omen
plugins.description: Creative skills -- TTRPG, worldbuilding, narrative design.

plugins.name: wiki
plugins.description: Raw note intake, knowledge management, and vault indexing for Obsidian.

plugins.name: nix-manager
plugins.description: NixOS config management -- add, remove, rice, refine, debug, and explain.

plugins.name: utility
plugins.description: Dev-environment setup skills -- pre-commit hooks and git guardrails. Isolated so they're easy to maintain or retire.

plugins.name: experimental
plugins.description: Personal skills on probation. Promote to a real domain once usage justifies it; demote to `deprecated` if it doesn't.

plugins.name: deprecated
plugins.description: Personal skills awaiting a keep/kill decision. Disable freely; delete once confirmed unused.
